data.content: Agent: codex | Model: gpt-5 | Version: 1. Refactored transitionToRetry() to dispatch retry advancement through advanceRetryState(), preserving knots->nextKnot(expectedState) and beads->nextBeat(currentState) via resolveMemoryManagerType(repoPath). Validation in dedicated worktree: bun run lint (warnings-only baseline), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (2030 tests), NODE_ENV=production bun run build.
